---
title: "Teaching Materials"
---

## Instructor Access

Instructor materials are available upon request for adopted courses where appropriate. These may include lecture slides, assignments, exams, and solution manuals.

For full instructor solution materials, please email a course syllabus and surface mailing address. Public companion files remain linked on [Downloads and Teaching](resources.qmd).

## Cambridge Course Materials

The Cambridge corpus includes manuscript chapters, question files, R code, slides, exams, and supplementary archives for *An Introduction to the Advanced Theory and Practice of Nonparametric Econometrics*. The public site should emphasize:

- publisher and citation links;
- public companion code archives;
- topic-level chapter guidance;
- instructor-material availability by request.

Full solution manuals and exam/assignment banks should remain request-only unless explicitly released.

## Oxford Course Materials

The Oxford corpus includes book manuscript files, R appendices, questions and answers, time-series material, robust inference material, model uncertainty material, and supplementary files for *Reproducible Econometrics Using R*. The public site should emphasize:

- errata;
- public reproducible-code downloads;
- the role of R, RStudio, TeX, Git, and reproducible workflows;
- instructor-material availability by request.

## Princeton Course Materials

The Princeton corpus includes book source, errata, examples, exercises, solutions, and applied code for *Nonparametric Econometrics: Theory and Practice*. Publicly surfaced materials include:

- table of contents;
- Chapter 1 from the publisher;
- errata;
- solutions to odd-numbered questions;
- applied-question R code.

Complete instructor solutions remain available by request.

## Recommended Public Site Boundary

For the public Research site, keep these categories visible:

- public PDFs and code archives;
- publisher pages and citation links;
- package manuals and vignettes;
- topic maps connecting books to software;
- clear instructions for instructors requesting restricted material.

Keep these categories out of direct public download unless explicitly approved:

- full instructor solutions;
- exams and assignment banks;
- private correspondence, contracts, royalty material, forms, and administrative files;
- draft review comments or internal production notes.
